insight: Cross-browser EN↔ZH extension: speech/STT path dominates risk; prefer meta-framework over hand-rolled packaging.
Zero-ops UX: auto ZH/EN detect + viewport translate; speech captions via in-page video capture first.
Extension INT focuses on content?background messaging; E2E loads unpacked extension with fixture pages.
Core value prop: in-page auto translate eliminates copy-paste to Baidu/Google Translate.

text: Encrypt-at-rest + remembered passphrase enables auto-unlock after browser restart; local threat same as plaintext.
iFlytek needs HMAC+WSS clients in SW; OpenAI /v1/audio cannot consume xfyun keys.
iFlytek SI needs content-side PCM16@16k capture; MediaRecorder webm is Whisper-only.

insight: Action popup cannot meet drag+stay-open; use empty default_popup + content Shadow iframe host.
